name: testAddCompanyByFillRequiredFields
description: Company can be added by filling out required fields
descriptionHtml: Company can be added by filling out required fields
statusMessage:
Locator expected to have text: SUCCESSCompany was created successfully Received: Call log: - Locator.expect with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator("[role='alert']") 6 × locator resolved to
…
- unexpected value "ERRORwebsite doesn’t qualify for the URL syntax Invalid customerDetails.country: ''. The country code must be a valid 2-letter code as defined by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 Invalid companyAddress.city: ''. It must contain only alphabetic characters and spaces Invalid companyAddress.zip: ''. It must contain between 2 and 10 characters"

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
